summary: All steps completed in a single iteration. Fixed mixed fan-in early-cutoff bug in both edit_param (sequential, lib.rs) and ConcurrentEvalAdapter (concurrent_eval.rs). Sequential fix uses has_changed_parent HashSet seeded from changed param's dependents; concurrent fix uses SkipState struct behind a Mutex for atomic check-and-modify. Added 6 tests: 2 reproducing the bug (sequential + concurrent), 2 triple fan-in variants, 1 freshness postcondition check, 1 regression guard for valid early cutoff. All 161+ tests pass.

All 10 steps completed. Gap 1 (ConcurrentEditResult discards resolution metadata): added resolved_params and diagnostics fields to ConcurrentEditResult, wired resolve_concurrent_edit return values into the result. Gap 2 (no concurrent constraint checking): factored constraint logic into Engine::check_constraints_with_values helper, created edit_check_concurrent function combining concurrent edit + constraint checking. Gap 3 (stale comment): removed 'Currently FAILS' note. Added 5 new tests: resolved_params flow, infeasible diagnostics flow, constraint satisfaction, constraint transitions, and end-to-end resolution+constraints. All 260 tests pass.

description: Fixed clippy::let_and_return lint in SequencedMockConstraintSolver::solve() by returning the if-expression directly instead of via intermediate let binding.

summary: All 4 remaining steps completed. Gap 4 (constraint label regression): added label field to ConstraintNodeData, populated it from CompiledConstraint.label in the graph builder, updated check_constraints_with_values to use cnode.label.clone() instead of hardcoded None. Updated all ConstraintNodeData construction sites in graph.rs tests, demand.rs, and deps.rs. Added 2 tests: edit_check_preserves_constraint_labels (sequential path, initially failing) and edit_check_concurrent_preserves_constraint_labels (concurrent path, passes immediately). All 495 tests pass across the workspace.

All 3 prerequisites and 20 steps completed. Implemented: (1) reify-stdlib eval_builtin with 21 math functions (abs, sqrt, min, max, floor, ceil, round, sign, log, log10, exp, pow, sin, cos, tan, asin, acos, atan, atan2, sinh, cosh, tanh) with proper type dispatch for Int/Real/Scalar/Angle. (2) Wired reify-expr FunctionCall evaluation to dispatch through stdlib with strict Undef propagation. (3) Compiled import declarations into CompiledModule.imports with warning diagnostics. (4) Compiled sub-structure declarations into TopologyTemplate.sub_components with arg expression compilation via parent scope. (5) Added sub_component() and import() builder methods. Added 31+ new tests across stdlib, expr, and compiler. All workspace tests pass.

All 4 remaining steps completed (NaN/inf domain-error hardening). Step-21: wrote 7 failing tests for domain errors (sqrt(-1), log(0), log(-1), log10(0), log10(-1), exp(1000), pow(-2,0.5)) — all correctly failed showing NaN/inf being returned instead of Undef. Step-22: added sanitize_value helper that converts non-finite f64 in Value::Real and Value::Scalar to Undef, applied in unary_f64 and binary_f64 — all 7 tests now pass plus 22 existing tests. Step-23: wrote 8 more tests for asin/acos out-of-range, sinh/cosh overflow, and boundary valid inputs — all pass. Step-24: full workspace test suite passes with 0 failures. This completes all 24 steps of the plan.

All 4 steps completed. Step-1: wrote 4 failing tests for DimensionVector::root() (area→length, length^4→length^2, length→fractional, dimensionless→dimensionless). Step-2: implemented root(n) method that divides each Rational exponent by n via Rational::new(num, den*n). Step-3: wrote 4 failing tests for dimension-aware sqrt in stdlib (scalar area, scalar length^4, fractional exponent, negative scalar). Step-4: replaced sqrt from unary_f64 to unary with Scalar pattern match using dimension.root(2), fallback to as_f64 for Int/Real. All workspace tests pass with 0 failures.

All 2 prerequisites and 8 steps completed. Pre-1: added minimize_declaration and maximize_declaration rules to grammar.js following constraint_declaration pattern. Pre-2: regenerated tree-sitter parser. Step-1: wrote 2 failing parse tests for minimize/maximize. Step-2: added MinimizeDecl/MaximizeDecl AST types, MemberDecl variants, lower_minimize()/lower_maximize() methods, updated all exhaustive matches. Step-3: added 3 parse validation tests (complex expr, mixed members, span/hash). Step-4: wrote failing compile test for objective field. Step-5: added objective field to TopologyTemplate, compiled minimize/maximize into OptimizationObjective, added builder method. Step-6: added maximize compile test and backward compatibility test. Step-7: added E2E round-trip integration test. Step-8: fixed boundary1_producer.rs exhaustive match, all 618 workspace tests pass with 0 regressions.
